actionUnits.condition: Automatic controller update events. Scene has two MonoBehaviours on GvrControllerMain: MonoBehaviour_1 (id: 949, guid: adde9bdea083943199c7959004756e60) maps to GvrController with emulatorConnectionMode=USB(1); MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 948, guid: 7dda4bb2d5509e44e978d2bf56e25d7c) maps to GvrArmModel with followGaze=DuringMotion(1), useAccelerometer=false(0). GvrController starts a coroutine (EndOfFrame) that, every frame, calls UpdateController and then invokes the OnControllerUpdate event. GvrArmModel subscribes to GvrController.OnControllerUpdate and internally invokes its OnArmModelUpdate event after computing arm/pointer state. No UnityEvent (m_Calls) entries are provided in scene, so these are automatically driven events. This trigger step simply advances frame time to allow OnControllerUpdate and OnArmModelUpdate to fire with the configured settings.
